data.name: Miss Neko: Pirates
data.detailed_description:
OFFICIAL DISCORD


關於此遊戲

在《Miss Neko: Pirates》中，玩家將扮演“幸運硬幣號”的船長，以俯視視角操作主角在一個充滿海盜的海島上進行冒險。強化你的角色，在這個對你有敵意的世界中存活下來。
由於船員的叛變，“幸運硬幣號”的船長被扔下了海，當船員們認爲他們殺死了自己的船長時，沉入了深海時，某種神秘力量讓你從死亡中幸存了下來。被奪去一切的你，能否通過強大的戰鬥力完成複仇，搶回屬於自己的海盜船，獲取島上的寶藏，並且懲戒叛變的船員？

遊戲特色

-海盜風格的劇情與冒險
-性格迥異的獸娘船員
-探索豐富的RPG地圖
-具有挑戰的俯視戰鬥和裝備成長
-擁有屬於自己的海盜船，收集船員在船上與你相伴

為了幫助船長更好地享受與船員的時光，我們提供以下隱藏功能：
1.在遊戲中連續按下「G」、「O」、「D」鍵將啟動無敵模式（每次載入畫面後會取消，需要在返回遊戲時重新啟動）。
2.在海盜船場景中，連續按下「↑」、「↓」、「→」、「←」、「↑」將召喚所有船員。

data.short_description: 前方海盜來襲！船長，骷髏島上的獸娘海員們還沒有見證過你的真正實力。能否用你的「❤戰鬥技巧❤」將她們一一征服，並將珍貴的寶藏掠奪到船上嗎？
data.supported_languages:
英文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7/8/10 32/64bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Miss Neko: Pirates
data.detailed_description:
OFFICIAL DISCORD


About the Game

In "Miss Neko: Pirates," players take on the role of the captain of the "Lucky Coin," overseeing the protagonist's adventures on a pirate-infested island from a top-down perspective. Strengthen your character to survive in this hostile world.

Thrown into the sea by a mutinous crew, the captain of the "Lucky Coin" was left for dead.Yet, some mysterious force allows you to survive from death, surviving the depths as the crew believes they've killed their captain. Stripped of everything, can you seek revenge with formidable combat skills, reclaim your pirate ship, seize the island's treasures, and punish the mutineering crew?

Game Features


Pirate-themed storyline and adventure
Diverse and characterful beast-girl crew members
Explore rich RPG maps
Engage in challenging top-down battles and equipment growth
Own your pirate ship, collect crew members to accompany you on board

To help captains enjoy their time with their crew more, we are providing the following hidden features:
1.Pressing "G" "O" "D" consecutively while in-game will activate invincibility mode (deactivates after each loading screen, requiring reactivation upon returning to the game).
the pirate ship scene, pressing "↑" "↓" "→" "←" "↑" consecutively will summon all crew members.
You will gain access to these features after the update.

data.short_description: Pirates ahead! The pirate girls on Skull Island have yet to witness the true extent of your prowess, Captain. Can you conquer them one by one with your ❤SKILLS❤ and plunder that precious treasure onto your ship?
data.supported_languages:
English, Russian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 7/8/10 32/64bit
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
